dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8359 IH: To change the address of the postal facility designated in honor of Specialist Jeffrey L. White, Jr.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Wagner introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To change the address of the postal facility designated in honor of Specialist Jeffrey L. White, Jr.

section.header: Specialist Jeffrey L. White, Jr. Post Office Redesignation

subsection.text: Section 1(a) of Public Law 115–134 (132 Stat. 340) is amended by striking 324 and inserting 211.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in section 1 of Public Law 115–134, as amended by subsection (a), shall be deemed to be a reference to the Specialist Jeffrey L. White, Jr. Post Office.
